'''hadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:boatside|boatside]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:boatside|boatside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hadate|hadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hadatesher|hadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadatesherĂ«m|hadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hadatero|hadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hadateshĂ«|hadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadateshĂ«m|hadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihadatero|gokihadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihadateshĂ«|gokihadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadateshĂ«m|gokihadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohadankerom|gohadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohadankeshĂ«|gohadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadankeshĂ«m|gohadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohadankeya|gohadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hadaterom|hadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadatemu|hadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hadateya|hadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihadaterom|gokihadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadatemu|gokihadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihadateya|gokihadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hadadate|hadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hadadatesher|hadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadadatesherĂ«m|hadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hadadatero|hadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hadadateshĂ«|hadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadadateshĂ«m|hadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihadadatero|gokihadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihadadateshĂ«|gokihadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadadateshĂ«m|gokihadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohadadankerom|gohadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohadadankeshĂ«|gohadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadadankeshĂ«m|gohadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohadadankeya|gohadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hadadaterom|hadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadadatemu|hadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hadadateya|hadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihadadaterom|gokihadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadadatemu|gokihadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihadadateya|gokihadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠdĂŠte|hĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠdĂŠtesher|hĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠdĂŠtero|hĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdĂŠtero|gokihĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠdĂŠteya|hĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdĂŠterom|gokihĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdĂŠteya|gokihĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafdafte|hafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafdaftesher|hafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafdaftesherĂ«m|hafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafdaftero|hafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafdafteshĂ«|hafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafdafteshĂ«m|hafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafdaftero|gokihafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafdafteshĂ«|gokihafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafdafteshĂ«m|gokihafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafdafnkerom|gohafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafdafnkeshĂ«|gohafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafdafnkeshĂ«m|gohafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafdafnkeya|gohafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafdafterom|hafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafdaftemu|hafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafdafteya|hafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafdafterom|gokihafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafdaftemu|gokihafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafdafteya|gokihafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
